---
name: Spec Issue or Implementation Bug
about: Report an ambiguity in the spec or a bug in the reference implementation
labels: bug
---

## What component is affected?

- [ ] SPEC.md (specification text)
- [ ] Reference implementation (`@01ai/core`)
- [ ] Type definitions (`@01ai/types`)
- [ ] Test vectors
- [ ] Documentation

## Spec section (if applicable)

e.g. §5.1 Step 8

## What does the spec or code currently say?

> Paste the relevant quote or code.

## What is the problem?

A clear description of the ambiguity, error, or bug.

## What should it say or do instead?

Your proposed correction or clarification.

## Can you provide a test case or example?

If this is an implementation bug, include a minimal reproducible example.
Do not include private keys or sensitive agent files.
